entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.openecomp.org/job/ncomp-core-master-verify-java/2/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.openecomp.ncomp.utils:ncomp-utils-java:jar:0.1.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.openecomp.ncomp.core:ncomp-core-types:jar:0.1.0-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.openecomp.ncomp.utils:ncomp-utils-java:jar:0.1.0-SNAPSHOT, org.openecomp.ncomp.utils:ncomp-utils-journaling:jar:0.1.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.openecomp.org/job/ncomp-core-master-verify-java/2/ )
